name: Tokyo Station Shinkansen Ticket Gate
location: Tokyo Station, Marunouchi District, Tokyo, Japan
layout: Wide open concourse with multiple parallel ticket gates flanked by glass barriers and metal railings; foreground features ticket validation machines and low barriers; midground includes overhead digital displays and signage directing to platforms; background shows escalators leading to tracks and distant station architecture with layered walls and high ceilings forming clear depth.
materials: Polished concrete floors with subtle anti-slip texture; stainless steel railings and frames; frosted glass panels on barriers; white and gray tiled walls with embedded LED strips; aluminum signage and metal ticket machines.
lighting: Diffuse overhead fluorescent panels providing even, cool white illumination from above; subtle sidelight from large windows on one side casting soft shadows; no harsh contrasts, maintaining stable and realistic light distribution.
atmosphere: Clean, efficient urban transit hub with a sense of quiet anticipation; low-frequency ambient hum from ventilation and distant announcements; cool temperature around 20°C, evoking modern functionality with underlying suspense through expansive, echoing space.
establishing_prompt: Empty wide-angle view of Tokyo Station Shinkansen ticket gate concourse at dusk, showing parallel metal barriers, ticket machines, overhead digital signs, escalators to platforms, polished concrete floors, frosted glass panels, and high ceilings with fluorescent lighting, in realistic cinematic style, no people, modern Japanese urban architecture.
